title: Nothing Happened on Thriller Bark

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We've got four people without shadows, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We wanted strawhat to do it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It looks like he can't even move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8

dialogue.speaker: Franky

dialogue.speaker: Franky
